name: ssh-ops
description: MCP server and CLI for remote Linux server operations: inventory, health, disk, file ops, service control, log search, network checks, package management, and cron CRUD.

interface.shortDescription: 13 SSH tools: inventory, files, services, packages, cron, network.
interface.longDescription: SSH Ops exposes 13 MCP tools for remote Linux server operations: hardware inventory, health checks, disk reports, log search, network probing, file read/write/patch (binary-safe), systemd service control, package management (apt/yum/dnf/apk auto-detect), crontab CRUD, and parallel multi-host execution. Reuses the local ssh binary, existing SSH config, and profile files without storing passwords or private keys.
defaultPrompt: Check my server hardware with SSH Ops.
Run a health check across all my servers.
Install nginx on my production server.
Search nginx logs for errors in the last hour.
Add a daily backup cron job on my server.
Can my app server reach the database on port 5432?
